title: chrysodium aureonitens
intro: Chrysodium aureonitens, also known as golden polypody, is a species of epiphytic fern native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Chrysodium aureonitens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Chrysodium aureonitens is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used to make herbal teas and tonics.
